name: RSS Reader MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server for RSS/Atom feed reading and aggregation. Enables AI agents to fetch and parse RSS/Atom feeds from any URL, aggregate content from multiple sources, monitor for new items, and integrate RSS-based content discovery into AI research and monitoring workflows.
use_cases: Fetching RSS feeds from news sources and blogs for AI content monitoring agents
Aggregating content from multiple RSS sources for research and summary agents
Monitoring specific RSS feeds for new publications by AI newsletter curation agents
Building RSS-based content pipeline workflows with AI agents
not_for: Social media platforms without RSS feeds (Twitter, Instagram, etc.)
Real-time event streaming (RSS has polling delay, not push)
Sites that have disabled or removed RSS feeds
best_when: A developer or content curator wants AI agents to monitor and aggregate RSS/Atom feeds from websites, blogs, and news sources as part of content research or monitoring workflows.
avoid_when: You need real-time social media monitoring or sources without RSS. RSS is standard but not universal.

auth.notes: No authentication — fetches publicly available RSS/Atom feeds. Some private feeds may require HTTP auth credentials.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free — RSS feeds are generally public
pricing.notes: Free open source. RSS feeds are free public content standards.

performance.rate_limits: Bounded by target website rate limits — be respectful with polling frequency

known_agent_gotchas: RSS feed format varies across sources — some sites use non-standard extensions
Feed URLs change over time — implement feed URL monitoring for production use
Respect robots.txt and site rate limits when polling RSS feeds frequently
Some sites block or throttle automated RSS access — implement user-agent and delay handling
agent_readiness.security_notes: Public RSS content — low sensitivity. HTTPS for secure feed fetching. Respect robots.txt and site terms for automated access.

security_score_components.security_notes: Public feed content. HTTPS. Respect site ToS for automated access.
